def match_keywords(text, keywords):
    matches = []
    for keyword in keywords:
        if keyword.lower().strip() in text.lower().strip():
            matches.append(keyword)
    return matches


def filter_by_prefix(items, prefix):
    results = []
    normalized_prefix = prefix.lower().strip()
    for item in items:
        if item.name.lower().strip().startswith(normalized_prefix):
            results.append(item)
        if item.name.lower().strip() == normalized_prefix:
            results.append(item)
    return results
